localizations.title: Red Mask
localizations.hiddenObject_3: The E's on the banner are written backward.
localizations.hint_2: You can't see anything in the darkness. You must find a light source.
localizations.hint_7: As you grab the secret documents from the safe, you notice the shadow of a man behind you. He is about to attack you with his sword. You must act quickly!
localizations.hint_11_first: Now that you have found Eldorado, you can go to the governor's grand reception (62) to investigate the disappearance of your friend Alfonso. Information hidden in the invitation will show you how to get there.
localizations.hint_11: If you look closely at the wax seal on the invitation, you will notice that the letter inside the seal is not what it seems.
localizations.hint_15_first: Alfonso has left a lot of information in this letter that will be useful to you during this adventure. First, locate Juan's home and the new access code to your secret cave.
localizations.hint_15: The letters circled in “Juan” (UA) form a number. The access code that will allow you to open the bookcase (54) has literally been changed in an exercise of prudence.
localizations.hint_20_first: There are too many men surrounding you to fight them all. You must find a way to escape. You can clearly see the balcony behind them, but how can you get to it?
localizations.hint_20: Find something with which you can hang onto the chandelier and swing over your assailants.
localizations.hint_24_first: Milena tells you that the governor and Salvador have plans to go out again tonight. This will give you the perfect opportunity to search the premises for information on Alfonso's disappearance. The house will be empty at sunset when the sun is closest to the horizon.
localizations.hint_24: Where can you find a setting sun on your cards?
localizations.hint_25: You can't risk venturing into the governor's house with your face uncovered. If you haven't already done so, access your secret cave, whose entrance is hidden behind the bookcase (54).
localizations.hint_28: You will need the light of this candle several times during the adventure...
localizations.hint_29_first: At first glance, it appears that Alfonso did not finish the letter… unless he found a way to hide more information within it! But how can you reveal these secrets?
localizations.hint_29: Afonso used invisible ink to hide bits of information. This ink can be revealed when placed close to a heat source.
localizations.hint_33: Before using the cloth to cover your face, you'll need to do something so you can see through it!
localizations.hint_35_first: Now that you are alone in the governor's study, you can search the premises.
localizations.hint_35: If you look carefully around the study, you will find a hidden number.
localizations.hint_42_first: Your horse, Eldorado, is hidden somewhere on this card.
localizations.hint_42: Literally look "right behind him" to find your horse, Eldorado.
localizations.hint_46: You could use this piece of cloth to serve as a mask, allowing you to continue your adventure.
localizations.hint_51_first: You can't enter this mine with your face uncovered. Look around for something that you can use to make a mask with.
localizations.hint_51: The red banner should do the trick. Isn't "KEEP" written oddly?
localizations.hint_54: This bookcase hides the entrance to your secret cave, but Alfonso changed the access code, and now you can't open it. If you haven't done so yet, first try to reveal the hidden information in Alfonso's letter (29).
localizations.hint_56_first: Flying sheets of paper partially hide some of the numbers. However, thanks to the numbers that remain visible, you should be able to deduce which cards to take.
localizations.hint_56: There is only one card in the deck starting with 6. Likewise, only one card's number ends with 9.
localizations.hint_62_first: First, find Eldorado. Then, find the information hidden within the invitation to travel to the governor's reception.
localizations.hint_62: Look closely at the wax seal on the invitation. The letter "G" conceals a red modifier.
localizations.hint_70: These documents will be useful once inside the gold mine.
localizations.hint_75: Salvador wants to engage you in a sword fight. Defend yourself!
localizations.hint_78_first: Alfonso writes in his letter (15) that you can rely on one of the governor's daughters. But which one? Your loyal friend has left you a hint...
localizations.hint_78: Alfonso's letter contains the drawing of a fan and several underlined letters: RED. The trustworthy governor's daughter holds a red fan (+9). What could you share with her?
localizations.hint_80: You will need this whip several times during the adventure.
localizations.hint_86_first: You should jump down onto Eldorado's back, but he is too far away!
localizations.hint_86: How can you call your horse to come closer?
localizations.hint_88_first: Several sticks of dynamite are about to explode, and you only have time to extinguish one of the fuses. But which one, and how should you do it?
localizations.hint_88: Of the three fuses, two of them are already being taken care of. To prevent the third from detonating the dynamite, you'll need to be skillful and precise.
localizations.hint_92: This fan will come in handy when you return to search the governor's office at night.
localizations.hint_95_first: Each of the four dials on the safe can hold an object.
localizations.hint_95: Once you have correctly placed Milena's fan on each of the four dials, the heart reveals the combination.
localizations.hint_97: Each direction is associated with a color. You must determine the correct sequence to maneuver through this maze of tunnels.
localizations.hint_machine_map_first: During your adventure, you have come across several hints describing the path the governor and Salvador took to travel to the mine. Follow these hints to recreate the path.
localizations.hint_machine_map: Alfonso's letter (15) states that the governor and Salvador were riding near the settlers' wagons by night. On the map, first select the area near these wagons. Uncle Juan provides the second area (42).
localizations.answer_hint_2: Use your candle (28) to light up your secret cave (2).
localizations.answer_hint_7: Unsheathe your sword (13) to block your opponent's attack behind you.
localizations.answer_hint_11: The wax seal forms a red +6. Ride Eldorado (11) to get to the reception.
localizations.answer_hint_15: The circled letters of the word Juan (UA) form the number 42. The code to access the secret cave behind the bookcase (54) is PRUDENCE. Click on the PRU, DEN, and CE books, then confirm.
localizations.answer_hint_20: Use your whip (80) to grab on to the chandelier (20) and swing over your assailants.
localizations.answer_hint_24: According to Milena, the house will be empty at sunset. Look at the back of your cards. On one of them, the sun is setting on the horizon.
localizations.answer_hint_25: After taking your Red Mask costume (10) from your secret cave, put it on (10) before sneaking into the governor's hacienda at night (25).
localizations.answer_hint_29: In the app, access machine (28). Place the candle near Alfonso's letter (29) to reveal the invisible ink.
localizations.answer_hint_33: Cut out two eyeholes in the cloth (33) with your sword (13).
localizations.answer_hint_35: Look closely at the largest painting. It hides the number 95.
localizations.answer_hint_42: Eldorado is hidden "right behind me," i.e., on the back of the card depicting Juan (42). Number 11 is hidden on the horse on the back of the card.
localizations.answer_hint_46: Your new mask (46) is ready for use. You can now venture into the mine without being recognized.
localizations.answer_hint_51: The two E's in "KEEP" are written backward and form number 33.
localizations.answer_hint_54: The access code to the bookcase (54) is PRU-DEN-CE. Pull the PRU, DEN, and CE books, then confirm.
localizations.answer_hint_56: Among the cards of this deck, only one starts with a 6 (62). Likewise, only one ends with a 9 (29).
localizations.answer_hint_62: The wax seal forms a red +6. Ride Eldorado to get to the reception (+6).
localizations.answer_hint_75: Unsheathe your sword (13) to protect yourself from Salvador's attack (75).
localizations.answer_hint_78: Tell her (+9) about Alfonso's disappearance by showing her his letter (15).
localizations.answer_hint_86: To call Eldorado, whistle close to your device's microphone.
localizations.answer_hint_88: One of the men is going to step on the fuse on the left and another one will put out the fuse on the right with a bucket of water. You must extinguish the one in the middle. Use your whip, aim precisely at the fuse, then confirm.
localizations.answer_hint_95: First, place the corner of the fan (92) so that it completes Milena's dial. The heart will point at the letter V in Violetta. Repeat these steps for Violetta's, Sofia's, and Luna's dials. The heart points respectively at the letters I, I, and nothing. These three letters form the Roman numeral VII.
localizations.answer_hint_97:
The color sequence is noted on one of the secret documents (70): yellow (straight), blue (right), red (left), blue* (right), green (right), red* (left), green (straight), purple (left), purple (right) and yellow (right). You must follow that sequence.
Two of the signs (indicated with *) have fallen off their posts; you need to deduce their direction by looking at the remaining signs.
localizations.answer_hint_machine_map: The different stages of the itinerary are the settlers' wagons (15), the cactus forest (42), the volcano (Milena (24) tells you that her father smells of sulfur when he returns from his outings), the ford (the governor and Salvador were soaked when you met them (17)).
localizations.machine_1111: Thanks to the information you gathered during your adventure, you reach the entrance to the mine.
localizations.machine_28: You hold the candle flame close to the letter, and the heat causes some new writing to appear.
localizations.machine_54: You correctly select the three books that make up the access code. The bookcase swings open, giving you access to a staircase leading downward into darkness.
localizations.machine_97: You arrive at the extraction area.
localizations.card_20_ar: You coil your whip around the chandelier and swing above the guards, scrambling onto the balcony's railing.
localizations.machine_80_error_card_88: No, that's not the right fuse!
localizations.machine_80_error_card_11: Have you gone mad? This is not how you usually treat Eldorado!
localizations.machine_80_error_card_24: This is such a bad idea!
localizations.game_end:
With a deft whiplash, you manage to extinguish the last dynamite fuse just in time. You saved all these men who were forced to mine gold for the governor and Salvador.

Among those you’ve rescued, you find your loyal friend, Alfonso. Unfortunately, you are unable to catch up with Salvador before he escapes. Keep your mask, as you will need it to continue fighting injustice throughout Alta California.
¡FELICIDADES!
localizations.machine_97_instructions:
To find your way through the mine, choose the correct direction at each junction by sliding your finger on the screen:

- toward the top to continue straight
- to the left to go left
- to the right to go right.
localizations.machine_map_intro: You whistle for Eldorado, who canters toward you, underneath the balcony. One of the guards tears off your mask as you jump onto your trusty steed and race off toward the mine.
